title: Add support for explicit cast to packed array, packed struct and enum
body:
Currently explicit casts for packed types are only supported to atom2 and vector types. Generalize this code so that it supports cast to all packed types.

Correctly supporting explicit cast to enum is a bit more involved. Enum variables can only be assigned a value if the value is of the same enumeration type as the variable. Explicitly casting an expression to a enumeration type allows to assign it to an enum variable, even if the original type of the expression was not of that enumeration type.

In order to support this the type of the cast needs to be attached to the expression, so that the check in the assignment elaboration can verify the type.
